title: 10pcs Silver Card, A4 Glitter Card Sheets, Silver Glitter Non Shed Glitter Cardstock for DIY Crafts, Scrapbook, Birthday Party, Decorations
features: 【Glitter design】One side is sparkling glitter, which can be used for decoration; the other side is smooth white paper, which can be used for writing or sticking on other materials (no glue on the back).

【Premium material】The glitter cardstock is made of 250gsm glitter paper, which is easy to fold and cut into various shapes. This glitter paper feels like sandpaper and the glitter does not come off easily.
【Glittery Card For Crafting】This pack of gold glitter cardstock paper opens the possibilities for a wide range of construction projects, card making, invitations, collaging, and much more.
【Proper size】You will receive 10pcs glitter cardstock paper in Silver color. Each glitter card is A4 size (20x30cm/7.9x11.8inch), making it easy to fold, punch and cut as needed.

【Wide application】Glitter paper is medium thickness, ideal for different shapes of crafts, such as invitations, birthday decorations, weddings, holiday cards or party decorations, etc., and the unique glitter effect will make your creations shine.
description: Specifications: Product Name: Glitter Paper Colors: Silver Size: A4 Quantity: 10 Sheets Sparkling Glitter Paper Our glitter paper is produced using a vibrant color printing process. The glitter powder on the surface shines brightly and shimmers in the light. The smooth surface is ideal for crafting. Single-Sided One side features vibrant, lint-free glitter, while the other side has a plain white reverse – ideal for personal messages or illustrations. Versatile Uses The glitter paper is suitable for bunting, cake letters, greeting cards, invitations, gift wrapping, scrapbooks, photo albums, greeting cards, wedding invitations, parties, and home decorations, etc.
